creator: char.seller@gmail.com
text:
Good day.

Have a problem with writing to my disk. Have sis 3112 controler, maxtor
sata 160 gb.

When a process writes data to disk (for example, "make install"), the
dmesg gives mesage ad4: "TIMEOUT - WRITE_DMA retrying (1 retry left)
LBA=217089031" and system hangs (stops for a while - 1 or 2 secs).

i've been looking for answers in internet, but havent found any one,
just description of this problem.

Thanks for possible advise.
